data.label: Brand Context
data.prompt:
⚠️ Load a client above to populate this automatically.

Brand: [Client Name]
Website: [website]
Logo: [logo url]

Colors:
  Primary: [#primary]
  Secondary: [#secondary]
  Accent: [#accent]

Typography:
  Display: [display font]
  Body: [body font]

Tagline: [tagline]
Tone: [tone tags]
Aesthetic: [aesthetic tags]
Target Audience: [audience]

Do's: [dos]
Don'ts: [donts]

data.label: Platform & Format
data.prompt:
Platforms: Instagram, Facebook
Format: Square 1:1
Tier: Starter (10 posts / month)
Style: Feed post, high quality, on-brand
Language: match brand native language (DE/EN)

data.label: 📋 Content Planner (10 ideas)
data.inputPrompt:
You are the content planner for a social media agency called El Kiosk. Using the Brand Context above, generate exactly 10 distinct post ideas for the next monthly delivery.

Requirements:
- Posts must be varied in angle: product highlight, behind-the-scenes, value/mission, user testimonial, educational tip, seasonal hook, community shout-out, brand story, offer/promo, aspirational/lifestyle.
- Each idea must align with the brand's tone, aesthetic, target audience, and Do's/Don'ts.
- Write in the brand's native language (German for DACH brands, English otherwise).

Output format — return ONLY this, nothing else:

POST 1: [one-sentence idea] | HOOK: [2-5 word visual hook] | CTA: [call to action]
POST 2: ...
...
POST 10: ...

data.label: ✍️ Post 1 — Image Prompt
data.inputPrompt:
You are the visual prompt engineer for Post #1 of the monthly Starter delivery.

Inputs available in context:
- Brand Context (colors, fonts, tone, aesthetic, do's, don'ts, target audience)
- Platform & Format (square 1:1, Instagram/Facebook feed)
- Content Planner output (10 ideas — use idea #1)
- Optional mood/vibe reference image attached as input

Write a single, highly-detailed image-generation prompt for Nano Banana Pro that visualizes post #1. The prompt MUST:
- Describe the subject, composition, lighting, color palette, mood, and style.
- Reference the brand colors by hex when relevant.
- Honor the brand's aesthetic tags.
- If a mood reference image is attached, describe the style/vibe to emulate.
- Never include text overlays (we add those separately).
- Be ready to paste directly into an image model — no preamble, no explanations.

Output: just the prompt, 2-5 sentences, no markdown.

data.label: 📝 Post 1 — Copy
data.inputPrompt:
You are the copywriter for Post #1 of the monthly Starter delivery.

Inputs available in context:
- Brand Context (tone, do's/don'ts, tagline, target audience)
- Content Planner output (10 ideas — use idea #1)
- Generated image (from Nano Banana)

Write the final social copy for Post #1. Output EXACTLY this structure in the brand's native language (German for DACH brands, English otherwise):

CAPTION: [3-5 sentences, engaging, on-brand, emoji-friendly]
HASHTAGS: [8-12 hashtags, mix of branded + discoverability]
CTA: [1 clear call-to-action matching the post's goal]

Rules:
- Match the brand tone exactly.
- Respect Do's and Don'ts.
- No placeholders or ellipses. Final, ready-to-publish copy.
